channel.title: openapi-spec Architecture Docs
channel.description: Architecture documentation for the openapi-spec codebase. Explore files, functions, classes, domains, and dependencies.

item.title: DocumentationNode Domain — openapi-spec Architecture
item.description: The infrastructure supporting the distribution and versioning of the specification for external developers. Architectural overview of the DocumentationNode domain in the openapi-spec codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: OpenApiSpec Domain — openapi-spec Architecture
item.description: The core definition of the Supermodel API surface, defining endpoints, data models, and request/response structures. Architectural overview of the OpenApiSpec domain in the openapi-spec codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: package.json — openapi-spec Source File
item.description: Architecture documentation for package.json, a json file in the openapi-spec codebase.
